paper_or_discovery: LiCoO2 cathode for rechargeable lithium batteries
evidence_summary: China captured major downstream and midstream lithium-ion battery value; IEA reports China had 70% of electric car production, over 80% of battery cell production, about 85% of cathode active material, and over 90% of anode active material in 2025.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=Very high; raw role=Battery cell manufacturing; cathode/anode active materials; EV manufacturing; stationary storage deployment; channels=Manufacturing scale; supply-chain clustering; exports; domestic EV/storage demand; notes=Applies to lithium-ion batteries broadly; LiCoO2 historical value was also captured by Japan/Korea/US/EU electronics firms.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Permanent magnet materials based on the rare earth-iron-boron tetragonal compounds
evidence_summary: IEA reports China produced 91% of refined magnet rare-earth output and 94% of sintered permanent magnets in 2024.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=Very high; raw role=Rare-earth refining; sintered NdFeB magnet manufacturing; EV motors; wind turbines; electronics supply chains; channels=Materials processing; magnet manufacturing; component supply; export leverage; notes=Paper originated in Japan, but China captured much of the downstream magnet supply-chain value.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Organic electroluminescent diodes
evidence_summary: Chinese OLED/display makers have become major smartphone display suppliers; Omdia coverage tracks Chinese and Korean OLED shipment volumes in 2025.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=High; raw role=OLED/display-panel manufacturing; smartphone and consumer-electronics assembly; display supply-chain scaling; channels=Panel production; module integration; device assembly; domestic and export markets; notes=South Korea historically captured large OLED value; China share is rising, so use sensitivity bands.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: 22.8% efficient silicon solar cell / passivated emitter rear cell architecture
evidence_summary: IEA says China’s share exceeds 80% across all solar-panel manufacturing stages and will approach 95% for key building blocks under capacity under construction.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=Very high; raw role=Solar PV wafer/cell/module manufacturing; PV manufacturing equipment; large-scale deployment; channels=Manufacturing capacity; exports; domestic installations; equipment supply; notes=Paper originated in Australia; China captured much of PERC-era PV manufacturing value.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Near Shannon limit error-correcting coding and decoding: Turbo-codes
evidence_summary: China had 4.838 million 5G base stations and about US$250.8B telecom business revenue in 2025; China also declared 42% of global 5G standard-essential patents.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=High; raw role=Telecom equipment, mobile-network deployment, handset ecosystem, mobile data services; channels=Network infrastructure; standards implementation; mobile services; cloud/IoT applications; notes=Turbo codes are earlier-generation channel coding; China benefit is via telecom platform adoption rather than paper-specific royalties.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Active pixel sensors: are CCDs dinosaurs?
evidence_summary: China benefits through large-scale electronics and camera-module supply chains; Yole notes China’s share rise in the CMOS image sensor landscape.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=High; raw role=Device manufacturing; smartphone cameras; automotive/industrial vision; security-camera ecosystems; channels=Electronics manufacturing; camera module integration; phones; automotive/IoT vision; notes=Core image-sensor IP and high-end sensor profits remain globally distributed, especially Japan, US, Korea, Europe and Taiwan-linked supply chains.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Candela-class high-brightness InGaN/AlGaN double-heterostructure blue-light-emitting diodes
evidence_summary: China is a large LED lighting market and production base; market sources estimate major China participation in LED lighting demand and supply.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=High; raw role=LED lighting manufacturing; displays; automotive lighting; consumer electronics; channels=Lighting product manufacturing; exports; domestic efficiency mandates; device integration; notes=Blue LED breakthrough originated in Japan; value capture is shared with Japan, Korea, Taiwan, US/EU brands and China manufacturing.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Layered space-time architecture for wireless communication in a fading environment when using multi-element antennas
evidence_summary: MIMO is a central wireless-network technology; China had 4.838 million 5G base stations, 1.204 billion 5G subscriptions, and 5G/industrial internet coverage across major categories by end-2025.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=High; raw role=4G/5G telecom equipment; massive mobile-network deployment; handset and mobile-service ecosystems; channels=Network equipment; mobile services; device supply chain; industrial internet; notes=Value also captured by US, Europe, Korea, Japan, India and global operators.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Phospho-olivines as positive-electrode materials for rechargeable lithium batteries
evidence_summary: China is the major global production hub for EV batteries and active materials; IEA reports over 80% battery cell production, about 85% cathode active material, and over 90% anode active material in 2025.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=Very high; raw role=LFP battery cell manufacturing; cathode active material; EV batteries; grid storage; channels=Battery supply chain; LFP cathode scaling; EV exports; stationary storage; notes=LFP commercialization is especially associated with Chinese battery and EV scaling, though origin paper was from the US.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: The Google File System
field_or_platform: Google File System / cloud data infrastructure
evidence_summary: China telecom/digital infrastructure data show cloud computing, big data, IoT and data centers as significant emerging businesses; Google-scale architecture influenced global cloud design patterns.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=Medium; raw role=Large-scale cloud/data infrastructure; China domestic cloud platforms; data centers; Internet services; channels=Cloud services; big data infrastructure; Internet platforms; data-center operations; notes=Indirect ecosystem influence; not a direct China implementation of Google File System.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: MapReduce: simplified data processing on large clusters
evidence_summary: MapReduce influenced Hadoop and cloud analytics worldwide; China’s digital infrastructure and cloud/big-data businesses are significant domestic value-capture channels.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=Medium; raw role=Big-data analytics; cloud data processing; domestic Internet platforms; enterprise analytics; channels=Cloud analytics; data pipelines; Internet-scale computation; data centers; notes=Indirect platform influence, not paper-specific revenue.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Bigtable: a distributed storage system for structured data
evidence_summary: Bigtable influenced NoSQL/cloud storage systems; China’s data-center, cloud and big-data ecosystem is a significant beneficiary channel.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=Medium; raw role=Cloud databases; NoSQL platforms; large-scale structured-data storage; channels=Cloud database services; data-center platforms; Internet services; notes=Indirect influence; specific database products should be audited separately.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: ImageNet classification with deep convolutional neural networks / AlexNet
evidence_summary: Stanford AI Index reports China leads in AI publication volume, citations and patent grants; China also has very large deployment channels in manufacturing and digital infrastructure.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=High; raw role=Computer vision in manufacturing, phones, cameras, autonomous systems, retail and public-sector AI; channels=AI software; vision systems; edge AI; camera ecosystems; industrial automation; notes=Revenue capture is global and difficult to isolate; US cloud/GPU firms capture large shares too.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Deep residual learning for image recognition / ResNet
evidence_summary: ResNet originated at Microsoft Research Asia in Beijing; Stanford AI Index reports China leads in AI publication volume, citations and patent grants.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=High; raw role=Computer vision platform research and deployment; Chinese-based origin via Microsoft Research Asia; manufacturing/robotics/AI use cases; channels=Research leadership; AI software; edge vision; industrial automation; camera/phone ecosystems; notes=This row is both China-origin-linked and China-beneficiary-linked; Microsoft is a US-headquartered firm, so corporate value capture differs from location of research.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: You Only Look Once: unified, real-time object detection

paper_or_discovery: Attention Is All You Need
evidence_summary: Stanford AI Index reports China leads AI publications, citations and patent grants, while the US leads notable model development; China is therefore a major beneficiary but not sole capturer.
analyst_notes: China update: strength=High; raw role=LLMs, generative AI applications, search/recommendation, enterprise AI, robotics and AI chips/infrastructure demand; channels=Foundation models; AI apps; cloud inference; data centers; enterprise productivity tools; notes=US firms, Taiwan semiconductor manufacturing, Korea memory, and global cloud ecosystems capture large shares too.; status=Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: BERT: pre-training of deep bidirectional transformers for language understanding
